'''Ala Cornin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. She was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces near the [[Gacerian system/Legends|Gacerian system]].

{{Char-stub}}
